title: "This Is The Beginning"
summary: We recap Audi's F1 launch! Violins,Vorsprung, songs and stairs... these are the best bits of a brilliant and bizarre event!  Our brand new Live Show is on sale now! Come join us at The Corner Hotel in Richmond Tuesday March 3 for the ultimate night out for F1 fans. Tickets and more info here:  And you can watch this episode on our Patreon! Want to support the show? Clicking ‘follow’ on Apple and Spotify or leaving a five-star review really helps!  Find us on Instagram and TikTok Thanks for listening!  Hosted on Acast. title: "Every Challenge Is An Opportunity"
summary: Adrian Newey is the new Aston Martin Team Principal? Who will win the 2025 World Championship? And what has Mickey Mouse got to do with F1?? Tim and Luke look back on Las Vegas and preview the Qatar Grand Prix. Plus we chat Helmut Marko, Hamilton's radio, Lawrence Stroll's reading, the Adrian Newey doco and Luke's CCTV system.  Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

title: "Loose Appendages"
summary: It's been a wait longer than George Russell's contract but finally the boys are back! Tim and Luke look back on all the drama from Singapore and more and chat papaya rules, Christian Horner rumours and Luke's medical history.  Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

title: "Podcast Nightmares"
summary: The boys are back! After the summer podcasting shutdown Luke and Tim talk Tim all things F1 - Valtteri Bottas and Checo Perez, Yuki Tsunoda and Gordon Ramsay, Franco Colapinto and Taylor Swift and Charles Leclerc and Duolingo. And isn't it ironic? Or is it...  Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

title: Horner's Gone
summary: Emergency Episode! Tim and Luke breakdown the big breaking Red Bull news. Why was Christian Horner sacked? Will Max Verstappen leave Red Bull? What's in Luke's sandwich? All will be revealed.  Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

title: "And We Box Now"
summary: All the action from Austria! Norris and Piastri, Max to Mercedes and Ferrari's pitstops. Plus not one, but two games - the return of Kympressed or Unkympressed and Luke debuts a brand new challenge... Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

title: "Maple Syrup On A Stick"
summary: After an epic Canada Grand Prix the boys breakdown everything from George Russell's win to Nico Rosberg's sleep routine and Lawrence Stroll's pants. Plus maple syrup, fish burritos and Luke reviews the F1 Movie! Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.
